title: CobbleMotion v1.5
description: A resource pack that adds simple idle animations to battle animations for Cobblemon models that do not have any.
body:
![Preview - meowscarada, escavalier, samurott, others](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1adafd135bb43e846e09af200e2686932ba2fdb3.png)

Adds a few Animations to Cobblemon Models that lack them. Attack Animations are still in progress but a number of Pokemon have animated attacks. All models in the pack have an Idle or Walking animation with some having attack animations and special in battle animations.

_The goal of this pack is to eventually be outdated until official animations are added, which will eventually replace the animations I made for the following models._

### Note:
As of v1.4, This pack should be placed in both your **resourcepacks** and your world's **datapack** folder

-------

------
**Guide for Compatibility with other packs:**

Use the list above as a reference when editing CobbleMotion or another pack you want to combine it with.

The names of these pokemon will be found in these folders
> - Animations
> - Models
> - Posers

Delete the name of the pokemon under those folders from either CobbleMotion or the other resource pack.

By doing this with any other resourcepack addon for cobblemon, you should be able to use multiple addons without issues.
